1.text: Holy Scripture most especially highlights this eternal and undeserved grace of our election by proclaiming and revealing to us that not all people have been chosen but that some have not been elected

Because of the remnants of sin that remain within them and also because of the temptations of the world and Satan, those who have been converted could not remain standing in this grace if left to thei
